name: Greek Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Garlic powder, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and garlic powder in a small bowl.
2. Rub the mixture evenly on both sides of the ribs.
3. Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the ribs.
4. Sprinkle oregano over the ribs.
5. Place the ribs in an oven-safe dish.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes to 1 hour, basting with lemon juice several times during baking and just before serving.
Makes excellent finger food. Serves 4.
